'''Amthau''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Genesia system/Legends|Genesia system]]. The surface was dominated by rocky canyons, which spoke of the [[Water/Legends|water]] which used to run across the planet's surface. This made the [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] project much easier. When the terraforming was complete, Amthau became a favorite vacation spot for the wealthy inhabitants of the planet [[Genesia]].

{{Planet-stub}}
